channel.title: 2 Peter on Christian Internet Resources
channel.description: Recent content in 2 Peter on Christian Internet Resources

item.title: 2 Peter 1
item.description:
2 Peter Chapter 1

            1 Simon Peter, servant and apostle of-Jesus Christ, to-the-ones having-received (a) faith of-the-same kind-as to-us by (the) righteousness of-the God and Savior of-us Jesus Christ.  2 Grace to-you and peace be-multiplied in (the) knowledge of-God and of-Jesus the Lord of-us.

            3 As the divine power of-him having-been-given to-us with-respect-to-all-things [the] pertaining-to life and godliness through the knowledge of-the One having-called us by-his-own glory and virtue 4 by which-things he-has-given to-us the precious and very-great promises, in-order-that through these-things you-might-become sharers of-(the)-divine nature, having-escaped the corruption in the world in lust.  5 And because-of-this itself, having-exerted all diligence, in the faith of-you supply [the] virtue, and in the/your virtue (supply) [the] knowledge, 6 and in the/your knowledge (supply) [the] self-control, and in the/your self-control (supply) [the] patience, and in the/your patience (supply) [the] godliness, 7 and in the/your godliness (supply) brotherly-kindness, and in the/your brotherly-kindness (supply) love.  8 For these-things being to-you and increasing, they-do┘not└make (you) useless or unfruitful unto the knowledge of-the Lord of-us Jesus Christ. 9 For to-whom these-things are┘not└present, he-is blind, short-sighted, having-received forgetfulness of-the cleansing of-the old sins of-him.  10 Wherefore rather, brothers, be-diligent to-make firm the calling and election of-you, for these-things doing you-will┘certainly not ever└stumble.  11 For thus richly/abundantly will-be-supplied to-you [the] entrance into the eternal kingdom of-the Lord and Savior of-us Jesus Christ.

item.title: 2 Peter 2
item.description:
2 Peter Chapter 2

            1 Now also false-prophets arose among the people as also false-teachers will-be among you, who will-under-false-pretenses-bring-in heresies of-destruction, denying the Master having-bought them, bringing-on themselves swift destruction.  2 And many will-follow-after the sensualities of-them on-account-of whom the way of-[the] truth will-be-blasphemed/maligned.  3 And in greed they-will-exploit you with-made-up words, for-whom the condemnation of-old is┘not└inactive and the destruction of-then does┘not└sleep.

item.title: 2 Peter 3
item.description:
2 Peter Chapter 3

1 Indeed, brothers, I-am-writing to-you this, (a) second letter in whichpl I-am-stirring-up in remembrance the sincere mind of-you 2 to-remember the beforehand-written words by the holy prophets and the commandment of-the apostles of-you, (the commandment) of-the Lord and Savior, 3 knowing this first that mockers will-come with mockery (the) last of-the-days going/pursuing according-to [the] their-own lusts of-them, 4 and saying, “Where is the promise of-the coming/presence of-him, for from which the fathers/ancestors fell-asleep, all-things remain thus from (the) beginning of-creation?”   5 For them willing, this escapes-(their)-notice:  that skies were of-old and land standing out-of water and through water by the word of-[the] God, 6 on-account-of whichms the then world was-destroyed having-been-flooded by water.  7 But now the skies and the earth by the same word have-been treasured-up for-fire, being-kept for-(the)-day of judgment and destruction of-[the] ungodly men.
